'''Dankin''' was [[Talon Karrde]]'s subordinate aboard the ''[[Wild Karrde]]''. He masqueraded as [[Abel Quiller]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] of the ''[[Wild Karrde|Hab Camber]]'', when Karrde went to [[Bilbringi Shipyards|Bilbringi]] to witness [[Mazzic]]'s [[Raid on Bilbringi|attack]] against the shipyards.

{{Char-stub}}
